commit_scope: Prove a compact Form state-externalized search harness that carries the Harness-1 architectural surfaces with one fact ledger and a trace-preserving choice receipt.

observed_results: search-harness-compact-proof.fk source proof -> 16777215 with 1 ok, 0 divergent across Go, Rust, and TypeScript
search-harness-compact-proof.fk binary artifact proof -> 16777215 with 1 ok, 0 divergent across Go, Rust, and TypeScript
Compact Form harness plus proof: 229 lines and 10,182 bytes
Local Python conformance harness plus five JSON vectors: 1,182 lines and 38,416 bytes
local_validation.notes: This proves the Harness-1 architectural surface as compact external state: candidate pool, curated set, evidence links, verification records, deduped observations, budget-aware rendering, and selected-branch receipt signatures. It does not claim Harness-1 retrieval benchmark recall.

ci_validation.notes: Pending push, PR, and GitHub checks.

e2e_validation.expected_behavior_delta: A Form-native state-externalized search harness now carries routine search bookkeeping outside the policy and emits a valid CHOICE-RECEIPT for the selected search branch.
test_flows: The proof verifies candidate, curated, evidence, verification, observation, stop, dedup, budget render, and receipt-signature preservation.

phase_gate.reason: Focused local source and binary proof passed. CI, PR, and deploy verification are pending.

evidence_refs: form/form-stdlib/search-harness.fk carries one compact fact ledger plus semantic decisions and a choice receipt bridge.

form/form-stdlib/tests/search-harness-compact-proof.fk returns 16777215 only when all six state-externalized search surfaces are present, duplicate observation state compacts, budgeted rendering caps context, and receipt signatures preserve the selected branch.
kernels/KERNEL_COMMON_GROUND.md records the proof boundary and measured compactness.
docs/AGENT-FRAMEWORKS-RESEARCH.md records Harness-1 as a state-externalized search pattern and links it to the compact Form proof.
